description: Style Note myntra captures the end of summer fun with this white floral printed top. Bright and flattering to your form, this top is a lovely day wear top which can be paired with jeans or jeggings for a day out look. Product Details White floral printed woven sleeveless top, has a round neckline in front and a V neckline at the back, a mock half buttoned placket and elasticated below the bust Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold Tumble dry low Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
